task_text:
Give me the start date for the project Family Map Wall.
Format:
Month DD, YYYY
Date only.

next_step.current_state: Need to bootstrap identity per instructions before task-specific work: tree /, then read AGENTS.md, then context. After that locate project Family Map Wall and extract its start date.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read project file and report completion

next_step.current_state: Bootstrap step 1 completed: inspected tree. Next required bootstrap step is reading the root rulebook file. Root contains AGENTS.MD (uppercase), so read that exact file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Find Family Map Wall project details
Read project README and extract start date

next_step.current_state: Bootstrap steps 1-2 completed: tree / and read root AGENTS.MD. Next required bootstrap step is context. After that, per AGENTS.MD, before task work I should inspect 99_system/ with tree and then identify any relevant workflow/schema docs; for a simple read-only project-date lookup, likely no specific workflow is needed, but I still need the 99_system tree inspection.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete: read root AGENTS.MD and loaded context. Before task work, root rulebook requires inspecting 99_system/ with tree. After that I can enter 40_projects, read its nested AGENTS.MD, then read the Family Map Wall canonical project README to get the start date.
Required bootstrap and 99_system inspection are done. Task is a read-only lookup in 40_projects, so next I must read the nested rulebook there before using files in that folder.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read Family Map Wall project README
Report completion with the start date

next_step.current_state: I have the project-lane rulebook. Family Map Wall appears in folder 40_projects/2026_04_06_family_map_wall, and the canonical project record is its README.MD. Reading that should provide the start date; if not, the folder prefix itself is authoritative for creation date.

Located the canonical project record and applied the project-folder naming rule from the root and 40_projects rulebooks. The Family Map Wall project folder is prefixed 2026_04_06, which is the project creation/start date.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system/, and read nested AGENTS.MD before entering 40_projects/.
function.outcome_justification: AGENTS.MD states project folders in 40_projects/ start with the project creation date as YYYY_MM_DD_, and 40_projects/AGENTS.MD repeats that rule. The canonical Family Map Wall record is 40_projects/2026_04_06_family_map_wall/README.MD, so the start date is 2026-04-06.
